Tirak
WelcomeAbout TirakYour CustomersMarketing HubResourcesPartner Portal

The companion-first travel wiki

Not a tour.
A vibe.

Tirak is a marketplace built for Thai companions first. You keep 80–85% of every booking, get approved same-day, and set your own schedule. No DSLR photoshoot. No platform exploitation. Just real locals sharing real Bangkok.

Start as a companion Read the voice guide

Why companions choose Tirak

80–85%companion earnings

Fair earnings

Keep 80–85% of what you earn. You do the work—you keep the money.
< 24hrapproval time

Same-day approval

Apply in the morning, go live by the evening. No months-long waits.
0DSLR required

Show up as you are

No professional photoshoot required. iPhone selfies and real moments win.

Your schedule, your rates

Host weekends, random Tuesdays, or full-time. You control when and how much.

Verified travelers only

ID checks, reviews, and in-app chat before you share contact details. Safety first.

Community support

Join Bangkok companions sharing tips, safety wins, and real earnings stories.

How it works

1

Apply

Fill out your companion application in about 5 minutes. Tell us about you and the Bangkok you love.
2

Get approved

We review and approve you same-day. No months-long black boxes.
3

Set your profile

Set your rates, availability, and the vibe you want to share. Use real photos, not stock shots.
4

Go live

Travelers can find you instantly. You choose which bookings to accept.
5

Earn and build community

Host experiences, get paid fast, and join a network of companions doing the same.

Ready to earn on your own terms?

Browse the wiki to learn how Tirak treats companions fairly, keeps travelers safe, and builds a community around authentic Thai culture.

Explore the wiki
